info.title: kubeops
info.description: CLI for KubeOps. Commandline tool to help with management tasks such as generating or installing CRDs.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: g, gen, generate
commands.description: Generates elements related to an operator.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: op, operator
commands.description: Generates all required resources and configs for the operator to be built and run.

options.name: --clear-out
options.description: Clear the output path before generating resources.

options.name: --format
options.description: The format of the generated output. [default: Yaml]

options.name: --out
options.description: The path the command will write the files to. If omitted, prints output to console.

options.name: --project
options.description: Regex pattern to filter projects in the solution to search for entities. If omitted, all projects are searched.

options.name: --target-framework
options.description: Target framework of projects in the solution to search for entities. If omitted, the newest framework is used.

options.name: --docker-image
options.description: An accessible docker image to deploy. [default: accessible-docker-image]

options.name: --docker-image-tag
options.description: Tag for an accessible docker image to deploy. [default: latest]

options.name: --no-ansi
options.description: Disable ANSI output.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: SLN/CSPROJ FILE
arguments.description: A solution or project file where entities are located. If omitted, the current directory is searched for a *.csproj or *.sln file. If an *.sln file is used, all projects in the solution (with the newest framework) will be searched for entities. This behaviour can be filtered by using the --project and --target-framework option. [default: not-found]

commands.name: api-version, av
commands.description: Prints the actual server version of the connected kubernetes cluster.

options.name: --no-ansi
options.description: Disable ANSI output.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: i, install
commands.description: Install CRDs into the cluster of the actually selected context.

options.name: --force
options.description: Do not bother the user with questions and just do it.

options.name: --project
options.description: Regex pattern to filter projects in the solution to search for entities. If omitted, all projects are searched.

options.name: --target-framework
options.description: Target framework of projects in the solution to search for entities. If omitted, the newest framework is used.

options.name: --no-ansi
options.description: Disable ANSI output.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: SLN/CSPROJ FILE
arguments.description: A solution or project file where entities are located. If omitted, the current directory is searched for a *.csproj or *.sln file. If an *.sln file is used, all projects in the solution (with the newest framework) will be searched for entities. This behaviour can be filtered by using the --project and --target-framework option. [default: not-found]

commands.name: u, uninstall
commands.description: Uninstall CRDs from the cluster of the actually selected context.

options.name: --force
options.description: Do not bother the user with questions and just do it.

options.name: --project
options.description: Regex pattern to filter projects in the solution to search for entities. If omitted, all projects are searched.

options.name: --target-framework
options.description: Target framework of projects in the solution to search for entities. If omitted, the newest framework is used.

options.name: --no-ansi
options.description: Disable ANSI output.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

arguments.name: SLN/CSPROJ FILE
arguments.description: A solution or project file where entities are located. If omitted, the current directory is searched for a *.csproj or *.sln file. If an *.sln file is used, all projects in the solution (with the newest framework) will be searched for entities. This behaviour can be filtered by using the --project and --target-framework option. [default: not-found]
